chosen_action.title: Added fresh third-party citation targets after saturated-lane reset

shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: pause same-family directory/outreach bursts and ship a different lane
distribution_lane_latest.json: the previously selected manual-contact lane had stalled without current contact-discovery targets
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse Claude Code / terminal / AI-coding comparison positioning truths
why_this_action.reasoning: The current curator/manual-contact branch had no fresh executable contact discovery, while live directory, curator, and Apollo lanes were already in flight. The strongest move available now was to create a genuinely new queue of high-fit third-party citation targets that can point serious evaluators to Codeberg first.

targets_added.why_it_fits: Fresh Claude Code ecosystem roundup focused on tools, skills, plugins, and MCP servers. Strong fit for Ralph Workflow's Claude Code workflow positioning and Codeberg-primary repo CTA.
Curated AI-assisted coding list that already groups command-line tools, coding agents, and code-quality workflows. High-fit citation target for Ralph Workflow's reviewable unattended-coding angle.
Terminal-AI roundup with explicit sections for coding assistants, agents, and provider-native coding CLIs. Fits Ralph Workflow's terminal-first orchestrator story and Codeberg-primary CTA.
Broad AI coding resources collection covering open-source AI development tools and editor alternatives. Good adjacent target for a free/open-source workflow layer positioned beyond one-shot editors.

result.expected_outcome: At least 3 fresh curator/citation targets are now available for the next outreach-prep execution instead of another saturated follow-through loop.
